statement: PA_DEG2_ALPHA_BASELINE carry-forward: at d=2, alpha-direction (deg a=1, deg b=2) the SIARC Wimp-Zeilberger naive Newton-polygon balance yields mu_dom=2, mu_sub=-1, A_naive=3. Note Theorem 1.1 reproduces this case in Section 3.2; matches PCF-1 v1.3 Section 6 Theorem 5 LOWER branch (A=3) at 80 algebraic digits.

PA_DEG3_ALPHA_BASELINE carry-forward: at d=3, alpha-direction (deg a=2, deg b=3), A_naive=4=d+1. PCF-2 v1.3 R1.1+R1.3+Q1 empirical record A_fit~6=2d (50/50 cubic). DRIFT by 2 framed as Proposition 1.2 gap.

PA_DEG4_ALPHA_BASELINE carry-forward: at d=4, alpha-direction (deg a=3, deg b=4), A_naive=5=d+1. PCF-2 v1.3 empirical record A_fit~7.954~8=2d (60/60 quartic, sigma=3.7e-3). DRIFT by ~3 framed as Proposition 1.2 gap.

PB_SWEEP_D5_TO_D8 carry-forward: Phase B extended sweep across d in [5,8] with three SIARC conventions (alpha/symmetric/delta) yields A_naive in {d-1, d, d+1} uniformly. The SIARC stratum is in NORMAL case (deg_a < 2*deg_b) but exhibits BORDERLINE-case A. Cited in Theorem 1.1 of bt_baseline_note.tex.

PC_GATES_C21_TO_C24 carry-forward: Phase C four sub-gates (non-resonance match, non-degeneracy match, d-range applicability, mu-units consistency) all pass for SIARC stratum at non-borderline locus per Birkhoff-Trjitzinsky 1933 Sections 7-9. Caveat at borderline locus (Section 7 Theorem II 'point of division'). Cited in bt_baseline_note.tex Section 5.

PD_VERDICT_UPGRADE_PARTIAL_FORMAL_LEVEL carry-forward: T1 Phase 2 closing verdict per phase_d_verdict.md (bridge commit 37c939f, 2026-05-04). The note crystallizes Phase A+B (formal-level baseline A_naive in {d-1, d, d+1}) plus Phase C (B-T 1933 Sections 7-9 machinery applies) plus Phase D (lift to A=2d at d>=3 deferred to T1 Phase 3 / sectorial upgrade gap).

PCF-1 v1.3 Section 6 Theorem 5 lower branch (V_quad QL01-QL26) literature-citation anchor for Section 3.2 d=2 verification (verified at 80 algebraic digits, A=3 lower branch, Wallis stratum). Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19937196.

PCF-2 v1.3 R1.1+R1.3+Q1 empirical record literature-citation anchor for Proposition 1.2 gap-framing: 50/50 cubic representatives + 60/60 quartic representatives with A_fit~2d at d=3,4 (precision dps=80, sigma~10^{-2} cubic, sigma=3.7e-3 quartic). Conjecture B4 reproduction in Section 1.3. Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19963298.
